Kansas City's Roofing Authority

Protecting homes and businesses across the metro. Reliable roofing solutions built to last.

Built on Kansas City Values

Braden Roofing started with a simple goal: providing honest, dependable roofing services to our neighbors in Kansas City. We're not just roofers; we're your neighbors, committed to safeguarding your homes and businesses from the unpredictable Missouri weather.

Our Roofer Services

Professional roofer solutions tailored to your needs.

Roof Replacement

Comprehensive roof replacement services for homes and businesses in Kansas City.

Learn More →

Roof Repair

Reliable roof repair services to fix leaks, damage, and other roofing issues.

Learn More →

Gutter Installation & Repair

Protect your foundation with expert gutter installation and repair services.

Learn More →

Storm Damage Repair

Fast and reliable storm damage repair services to restore your roof and protect your home.

Learn More →

Roof Inspections

Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems and ensure the longevity of your roof.

Learn More →

Commercial Roofing

Expert commercial roofing services for businesses in Kansas City, MO.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our roofer services.

How long does a roof replacement typically take?

The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most residential replacements are completed within 1-3 days.

What types of roofing materials do you offer?

We offer a wide range of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, metal roofing, tile roofing, and more. Our team can help you choose the best option for your needs and budget.

Do you offer financing options for roof replacements?

Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your roof replacement project more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

Reviews From Our Roofer Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Braden Roofing did a fantastic job replacing our roof after the hailstorm last spring. The crew was professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything perfectly. Our new roof looks great, and we feel much more secure now. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. Roof Replacement

"We had a section of gutter that was pulling away from the house. Braden Roofing came out quickly and fixed it securely. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent."

John K. Gutter Repair

"I had a persistent leak in my roof that other companies couldn't seem to fix. Braden Roofing found the source of the leak and repaired it quickly and effectively. Very happy with their work!"

Emily P. Roof Repair
